arts.ttl: Barcelona star sends message to Neymar following Santos return
arts.sum: Barcelona star Raphinha has taken to social media, to send a message of well-wishes to compatriot Neymar Jr. This, of course, comes after the latter’s latest high-profile transfer was made…

arts.ttl: Barcelona youth talent spotted in first-team training ahead of Alavés
arts.sum: A highly-regarded member of the academy setup at La Liga giants Barcelona was on Saturday afforded a place in first-team training. The player in question? Iker Rodriguez. Rodriguez, for those…

arts.ttl: Guardiola sends €24m to Barcelona as Man City with fourth major signing
arts.sum: With this in mind, Guardiola has set his eyes on former Barcelona star Nico Gonzalez, who is currently playing with Porto . Although Man City have already completed a string of big deals during the transfer window, headlined by Omar Marmoush’s switch from Eintracht Frankfurt for around €80 million, the out-of-sorts Etihad outfit are still seeking to achieve more.

arts.ttl: Barcelona receive transfer offer from Porto
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have this week received a loan offer for a member of the club’s attacking ranks. The player in question? Ansu Fati. Attacker Ansu has of course…

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick confirms Barcelona’s no.1 goalkeeper
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick has on Saturday confirmed the current goalkeeper pecking order in his squad. The subject of the goalkeeper situation in Hansi Flick’s squad has of course…

arts.ttl: Barcelona handed injury boost for Alavés clash
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have been afforded a timely boost on the personnel front, ahead of their upcoming meeting with Deportivo Alavés. This comes amid confirmation that defender Iñigo Martínez…

arts.ttl: Team News: Barcelona vs. Alaves injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's La Liga clash between Barcelona and Alaves.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa sporting director Monchi names Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal as one of three “dream signings”
arts.sum: Monchi (Aston Villa) names three of his "dream signings:" Lamine Yamal, Erling Haaland, Jude Bellingham pic.twitter.com/60K89QnO7p Monchi, Aston Villa ’s president of football operations, has given a list of who he would consider his “dream signings” in an interview with Spanish radio.

arts.ttl: Man City negotiating asking price of midfielder Barcelona sold for €8.5m in 2023
arts.sum: Manchester City are interested in Porto's Nico Gonzalez but any deal for the Spanish midfielder will be complicated.

FC Barcelona watched Friday's Champions League play off draw as an interested spectator after gaining a direct place in the last 16 of the competition thanks to their second place finish in the group stage. Champions League play off draw complete - FC Barcelona
